---
title: "02_lmer_variablity"
author: "Stróbl Anita"
date: "2026-04-09"
output: html_document
---

``` {r packages, message = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(psych) 
library(rstatix)
library(lme4)        
library(lmerTest) 
library(lmeresampler)
library(performance) 
library(sjPlot)
library(emmeans)
library(MuMIn)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(writexl)
library(effsize)

```

``` {r import database, message = FALSE}

dat <- read_csv("databases/dat_processed.csv")

```

``` {r lmer data}

dat_lmer <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    ref_ms = as.numeric(ref_ms),
    prod_int = as.numeric(prod_int)) %>%
  group_by(ID, ref_category) %>% 
  mutate(
    prod_between = mean(prod_int, na.rm = TRUE),
    prod_within = abs(prod_int - prod_between) / ref_ms,
    prod_precision = abs(prod_int - prod_between) / prod_int)%>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(group = relevel(factor(group), ref = "Kontrollcsoport")) 

```

``` {r check}

# 1. Normalitás tesztelése (Shapiro-Wilk) kondíciónként és csoportonként
normality_results <- dat_lmer %>%
  group_by(ref_category, group) %>%
  shapiro_test(prod_within)

# 2. Szórás-homogenitás (Levene-teszt) kondíciónként
homogeneity_results <- dat_lmer %>%
  group_by(ref_category) %>%
  levene_test(prod_within ~ group)

# 3. Outlierek azonosítása (statisztikai alapon)
outliers_results <- dat_lmer %>%
  group_by(ref_category, group) %>%
  identify_outliers(prod_within)

# Eredmények kiíratása a konzolra
print("--- NORMALITÁS (Shapiro-Wilk) ---")
print(normality_results)

print("--- SZÓRÁS-HOMOGENITÁS (Levene-teszt) ---")
print(homogeneity_results)

```

``` {r lmer precision all in one}

# library(emmeans)

color <- c("#66C2A5", "#FC8D62", "#BC80BD")

mv <- lmer(prod_within ~ group * ref_category + (1 | ID), data = dat_lmer)

anova(mv)

emmeans_mv <- emmeans(mv, pairwise ~ group | ref_category)
summary(emmeans_mv)

plot_lmer_precision <- plot_model(mv, 
           type = "pred", 
           terms = c("ref_category", "group"), 
           dot.size = 3,
           line.size = 1,
           color = color) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Precizitás (precision)",
       y = "Hiba mértéke",
       x = "Időtartam kondíciók",
       color = "Csoport")

print(plot_lmer_precision)

ggsave("plots/plot_lmer_precision.png", plot = plot_lmer_precision, height = 12, width = 20, units = "cm", dpi = 300)

# eff size
eff_size_em <- eff_size(emmeans_mv, method = "identity", edf = Inf, sigma = sigma(mv))

summary(eff_size_em)

```
``` {r lmer precision all in one}

# library(emmeans)

color <- c("#66C2A5", "#FC8D62", "#BC80BD")

mp <- lmer(prod_precision ~ group * ref_category + (1 | ID), data = dat_lmer)

anova(mp)

emmeans_mp <- emmeans(mp, pairwise ~ group | ref_category)
summary(emmeans_mp)

plot_lmer_mp <- plot_model(mp, 
           type = "pred", 
           terms = c("ref_category", "group"), 
           dot.size = 3,
           line.size = 1,
           color = color) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Precizitás (precision)",
       y = "Hiba mértéke",
       x = "Időtartam kondíciók",
       color = "Csoport")

print(plot_lmer_mp)

ggsave("plots/plot_lmer_mp.png", plot = plot_lmer_mp, height = 12, width = 20, units = "cm", dpi = 300)

# eff size
eff_size_mp <- eff_size(emmeans_mp, method = "identity", edf = Inf, sigma = sigma(mv))

summary(eff_size_mp)

```


``` {r}

dat_short <- dat_lmer %>%
  filter(ref_category == "0,65 mp (rövid)") %>%
  group_by(ID, group) %>%
  summarise(
    cv = sd(prod_int, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(prod_int, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_error = mean(prod_within, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Kruskal-Wallis teszt a rövid kondícióra
kw_result <- dat_short %>% kruskal_test(cv ~ group)

# Ha a kw_result szignifikáns (p < 0.05), jöhet a post-hoc:
dunn_result <- dat_short %>% dunn_test(cv ~ group, p.adjust.method = "holm")
wx_effsize <- dat_short %>% wilcox_effsize(cv ~ group, p.adjust.method = "holm")

tibble(kw_result)
tibble(dunn_result)
tibble(wx_effsize)

```

``` {r precision cv analysis}

# 1. Adatok tisztítása és aggregálása (CV számítása személyenként)
dat_cv <- dat_lmer %>%
  group_by(ID, group, ref_category) %>%
  summarise(
    cv = sd(prod_int, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(prod_int, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_trials = n(), 
    .groups = "drop")

# 2. Leíró statisztika csoportonként és kondíciónként
cv_summary <- dat_cv %>%
  group_by(ref_category, group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_cv = mean(cv, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_cv = sd(cv, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_cv = median(cv, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop" )

print(cv_summary)

# 3. Statisztikai összehasonlítás (Kruskal-Wallis és Effektusméret)
# Ezt minden kondícióra (rövid, közepes, hosszú) lefuttatjuk
cv_stats <- dat_cv %>%
  group_by(ref_category) %>%
  do({
    kw <- kruskal_test(., cv ~ group)
    eff <- kruskal_effsize(., cv ~ group)
    data.frame(kw, eff_size = eff$effsize, magnitude = eff$magnitude)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

print(cv_stats)

# 4. Post-hoc teszt a csoportok közötti konkrét eltérésekre
cv_posthoc <- dat_cv %>%
  group_by(ref_category) %>%
  dunn_test(cv ~ group, p.adjust.method = "holm")

print(cv_posthoc)

```

```{r cv visualization}

# 1. Színpaletta rögzítése a konzisztencia érdekében
cv_colors <- c("Kontrollcsoport" = "#66C2A5", 
               "Magas bipoláris zavar kockázat" = "#FC8D62", 
               "Magas szkizofrénia-kockázat" = "#BC80BD")

# 2. Ábrázolás
plot_cv_precision <- ggplot(dat_cv, aes(x = ref_category, y = cv, color = group, group = group)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_cl_boot, 
               geom = "errorbar", 
               width = 0.1, 
               size = 1,
               position = position_dodge(0.4)) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, 
               geom = "point", 
               size = 4,
               position = position_dodge(0.4)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cv_colors) +
    theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Precizitás (precision)",
       y = "Variációs Koefficiens (CV)",
       x = "Időtartam kondíciók",
       color = "Csoport") 

print(plot_cv_precision)

ggsave("plots/plot_cv_precision.png", plot = plot_cv_precision, height = 12, width = 20, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
  
```

``` {r bootstrap}

# boot_mv <- lmeresampler::bootstrap(mv, .f = fixef, type = "wild", 
             # hccme =  "hc2", aux.dist = "mammen", 
             # B = 1000, resample = c(TRUE, TRUE))

boot_results <- confint(boot_mv, type = "perc") 

print(boot_mv)

# Konfidencia-intervallumok
boot_ci <- confint(boot_mv, type = "perc") %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("term")

print(boot_ci)

```

``` {r visualisation bootstrap}

# 1. Adatok előkészítése a megjelenítéshez
# Megkeressük az Interceptet (Kontroll @ 0,65 mp) és a csoport-eltéréseket
plot_boot_data <- boot_results %>%
  filter(term %in% c("(Intercept)", 
                     "groupMagas szkizofrénia-kockázat", 
                     "groupMagas bipoláris zavar kockázat")) %>%
  mutate(term_label = case_when(
    term == "(Intercept)" ~ "Kontroll (Bázis)",
    str_detect(term, "szkizof") ~ "Szkizotíp eltérés",
    str_detect(term, "bipol") ~ "Bipoláris eltérés"
  ))

# 2. Forest plot készítése
ggplot(plot_boot_data, aes(x = reorder(term_label, lower), y = (lower + upper)/2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.2, size = 1.2, color = "#2c3e50") +
  geom_point(size = 5, color = "#e74c3c") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Wild Bootstrap eredmények a rövid kondícióban (0,65 mp)",
    subtitle = "95% Percentilis Konfidencia Intervallumok",
    y = "Becsült hatás (Relatív hiba / Eltérés mértéke)",
    x = ""
  )

```
